hero.subheadline: Production-ready monorepo with multi-tenancy, AI infrastructure, billing, and everything you need to launch.

features.sectionTitle: Built for production from day one.

item0.title: Multi-tenant from day one
item0.description: Row-level security, org isolation, and tenant routing built into every layer. No bolted-on afterthoughts.

item1.title: AI-native infrastructure
item1.description: Provider abstraction over OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini. Swap models without changing your application code.

item2.title: Billing wired up
item2.description: Stripe subscriptions, usage meters, and webhook handlers — production-ready, not demo-ware.

logoStrip.tagline: Built on the stack you already trust

metadata.title: Nebutra Sailor — The Open-Source Enterprise SaaS Framework
metadata.description: Ship your SaaS in weeks, not months. Multi-tenancy, billing, auth, and AI built in. Production-ready, MIT licensed.
